faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Glen Oaks typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Glen Oaks homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments are completed in one day, though severe infestations may require follow-up visits. Heat treatments typically take 6-8 hours, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 applications spaced two weeks apart for complete elimination of all life stages.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our certified technicians. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. Heat treatments are chemical-free, while our targeted chemical applications require only a brief 2-4 hour evacuation period before your family can safely return home.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Glen Oaks. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period, we'll re-treat your home at no additional cost. Our goal is complete elimination, and we stand behind our work with follow-up inspections to ensure success.
